---
title: "IC Design of a Universal Biquad Filter"
author: 
  - name: Julian Höpe
    orcid: 
    email: jhoepe@stud.hs-bremen.de
    corresponding: true
    roles: "Lead author"
    affiliation:
      - name: Hochschule Bremen - City University of Applied Sciences (HSB)
        city: Bremen
        state: Germany
        url: https://www.hs-bremen.de/en/  
  - name: Sven Samland
    orcid: 
    email: ssamland@stud.hs-bremen.de
    corresponding: true
    roles: "Lead author"
  - name: Julian Scheeler
    orcid: 
    email: jscheeler@stud.hs-bremen.de
    corresponding: true
    roles: "Lead author"

keyword:
  - Filter Design 
  - PCB
  - IIC-Tools
  - Biquad
  - Integrated Circuit Design
  - xSchem
  - KLayout

bibliography: references.bib
  
abstract: |
  In this development report the design process of an integrated universal biquad filter is described. The development
  was done in a docker image for integrated circuit design, which is part of an open source kit. Subject of this
  development report is the design of an universal biquad filter, including the filter characterization and several
  steps of circuit design. Furthermore, the layout process is also part of this documentation. Additionally, the
  experiences with the open source development environment are shared as well. The filter was designed by the use of the
  IHP sg13g2 PDK. [**GitHub Repo**](https://github.com/Svensam/AMCD_Group2_IC_Design)
---

{{< include content/_sec_introduction.qmd >}}
{{< include content/_sec_preparation.qmd >}}
{{< include content/_sec_schematic.qmd >}}
{{< include content/_sec_filter-design.qmd >}}
{{< include content/_sec_circuit-design.qmd >}}
{{< include content/_sec_layout.qmd >}}
{{< include content/_sec_challenges.qmd >}}
{{< include content/_sec_conclusion.qmd >}}
<!-- {{< include content/references.qmd >}} -->
